executive_summary: Pre-upgrade risk assessment (model v1.0.0): overall recommendation is REVIEW with a composite score of 69/100 across 81 CVE(s) (0 BLOCK, 46 REVIEW).

per_cve.paragraph: CVE-2020-14343 scores 69/100 (REVIEW). CVSS 9.8 contributes 39 severity points. Transitive exposure: package PyYAML affected, no code path Exploit likelihood: EPSS 0.65 and listed in CISA KEV catalog. Blast radius: no services directly impacted.

CVE-2020-1747 scores 64/100 (REVIEW). CVSS 9.8 contributes 39 severity points. The //admin/config entry point reaches `load_config` in config_loader.py:29 via a 1-hop call-graph path. No elevated exploit probability in offline EPSS/KEV snapshots. Blast radius: no services directly impacted.

CVE-2018-1000656 scores 63/100 (REVIEW). CVSS 7.5 contributes 30 severity points. The //api/data entry point reaches `api_data` in app.py:27 via a 1-hop call-graph path. Exploit likelihood: EPSS 0.12. Blast radius: no services directly impacted.

CVE-2019-10906 scores 59/100 (REVIEW). CVSS 8.6 contributes 34 severity points. The /tasks.py entry point reaches `jinja2.sandbox.SandboxedEnvironment` in tasks.py:7 via a 2-hop call-graph path. No elevated exploit probability in offline EPSS/KEV snapshots. Blast radius: no services directly impacted.
